requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: DevHub account before starting an online trade permit request with plan review
conditions: request is initiated through Development Hub PDX
online permit services require PortlandOregon.gov credentials
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: before drafting or submitting the request

evidence.title: Development Hub PDX FAQ
evidence.quote: DevHub is Portland's online permitting system and uses PortlandOregon.gov credentials for online permitting services.

requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: trade permit with plan review request type
conditions: project is a trade permit request that requires plan review
permit request type is available in DevHub public application guidance

evidence.title: Apply for permits in Development Hub PDX
evidence.quote: Public guidance lists trade permits with plan review among DevHub permit request types.

requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: project address, property identifier, trade discipline, and work description
conditions: DevHub request requires enough project information for intake and routing
permit type and scope determine required uploads and review path

evidence.title: Trade permit with plan review process fixture
evidence.quote: Fixture process model requires property, permit type, trade discipline, project scope, and applicant/contact facts.

requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: completed application and supporting trade permit documents
conditions: request is a trade permit with plan review
supporting documents are required for intake and plan review
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: before submitting the request for intake

evidence.title: Apply for permits in Development Hub PDX
evidence.quote: Application guidance directs applicants to prepare and upload required application materials before submitting online requests.

requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: plan drawings as PDF files compatible with the applicable plan-review process
conditions: plan review is required
drawings or plans are part of the submittal package
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: before request submission and before review can proceed

evidence.title: Single PDF Process
evidence.quote: Public guidance says drawing plans are submitted as one searchable PDF when the Single PDF Process applies.

requirements.subject: agent
requirements.object: intake fee payment or payment-detail entry
conditions: DevHub displays fees due
payment is needed before the application can proceed or permit can be issued
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: when DevHub reaches a fee or payment step

evidence.title: Development Hub PDX FAQ
evidence.quote: Public DevHub FAQ includes fee payments as an online service category.

requirements.subject: agent
requirements.object: review, issuance, or remaining fee payment
conditions: additional fees are assessed after intake or review
payment action is financial and user-specific
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: before any assessed fee is paid

evidence.title: Development Hub PDX FAQ
evidence.quote: Fee payment is a DevHub workflow checkpoint and must remain user-confirmed.

requirements.subject: applicant
conditions: reviewer issues corrections or a checksheet
application cannot advance until corrections are resolved
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: after correction notice and before approval or issuance

evidence.title: Development Hub PDX FAQ
evidence.quote: Public DevHub FAQ lists correction uploads as an online permitting service.

requirements.subject: agent
conditions: correction documents are ready for upload
upload would become part of the official permit record

evidence.title: PP&D scraping, automation, and logic guardrails plan
evidence.quote: Potentially consequential actions require exact user instruction, action preview, confirmation checkpoint, and durable audit event.

requirements.subject: agent
requirements.object: permit request submission or certification acknowledgement
conditions: all required fields and uploads appear complete
submission or certification would be consequential
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: immediately before submission or certification action

evidence.title: PP&D scraping, automation, and logic guardrails plan
evidence.quote: Agents must stop before submission, certification, payment, cancellation, inspection scheduling, or official upload unless the user explicitly confirms the exact action.
